photos.title: Tours - Hôtel de Ville - 09.jpg
photos.description: Tours (Indre-et-Loire, France) - Town hall - Pediment : the clock is flanked with allegories of Day and Night (by Emile Joseph Nestor Carlier), and the two lounging figures of Loire and Cher rivers (by Jean-Antoine Injalbert)
photos.author: Benjamin Smith
